creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 169786
Update to version 1.8

Move to new home on github.

From the NEWS file:

codespell
*********

1.8
===

* Update the list of misspellings
* Fix warning about wrong encoding

1.7
===

* Fix handling foreign newline characters
* Update the list of misspellings
* Only process non-empty regular files
* Install in /usr/local by default
* Better support for colour output
